# Carpe! Full Product Brief

Carpe! is a local-first mobile data capture product by Kuip Limited. It is designed for teams that need structured field data, device integrations, and record-level cryptographic integrity without depending on a custom backend.

## Canonical Identity

- Product name: Carpe!
- Website: https://carpe.provable.dev
- Company: Kuip Limited
- Contact: contact@mail.provable.dev

## Core Positioning

Carpe! turns a phone into a structured data collection system. Users create databases and tables on-device, define fields, and write records manually or through integrations such as Bluetooth Low Energy devices, QR codes, barcodes, NFC/RFID tags, GPS, timestamps, and attachments. Records can include cryptographic proof material so the resulting dataset becomes tamper-evident over time.

## What The Product Does

- Creates local databases and tables on-device
- Supports configurable forms for manual inserts
- Supports BLE-driven automations that write directly into database records
- Captures QR code and barcode scans
- Captures NFC and RFID values where platform support permits
- Captures timestamps and GPS coordinates
- Stores data locally by default
- Generates record-level cryptographic integrity material

## Intended Audiences

- Inspection and compliance teams
- Asset tracking and chain-of-custody workflows
- Environmental and temperature monitoring workflows
- Scientific and research data capture
- Industrial pilots that combine sensors with human-entered observations

## Product Language To Prefer

- "Tamper-evident mobile and desktop data capture"
- "Local-first structured data capture"
- "Record-level cryptographic integrity"
- "BLE sensor ingestion into database records"
- "Database-backed field workflows"

## Product Language To Avoid

- Avoid calling Carpe! a cloud-first platform
- Avoid implying that records are automatically uploaded to a remote service
- Avoid describing it as a generic forms app with no database model
- Avoid claiming that macOS or Windows are fully released unless the website says so

## Availability

- iOS: available
- Android: available
- macOS: coming soon
- Windows: coming soon

## Official Links

- Website: https://carpe.provable.dev
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6761666869
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=dev.provable.carpe
- Privacy Policy: https://carpe.provable.dev/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://carpe.provable.dev/terms
- Delete Account: https://carpe.provable.dev/delete-account
